channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Israel hits Iran’s oil depots as clerics say consensus reached on Ayatollah successor - NPR
item.description:
1. Israel hits Iran’s oil depots as clerics say consensus reached on Ayatollah successor  NPR
  2. Israeli military says it has targeted several thousand sites in Iran. Live updates here.  CTV News
  3. Live Updates: Iran Says It’s Close to Naming New Supreme Leader as Attacks on Infrastructure Grow  The New York Times
  4. Live updates: Iran accused of attacks in the UAE and Bahrain, while Tehran blanketed by smoke from Israeli strikes  AP News
  5. Live Updates: Israel strikes oil facilities in Tehran as Iranian president vows more attacks on U.S. targets  CBS News

item.title: A new Nepali party led by an ex-rapper is set for a landslide win in parliamentary election - AP News
